title: Enzyme (performance) mark some functions as non-differentiable

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `JLD2` package from `0.4` to `0.4, 0.5`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for JLD2 to 0.5, (keep existing compat)
